name: iagent
description: Generate images and videos in iAgent from Codex through a local browser bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Generate images and videos with iAgent.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the signed-in iAgent Creative Studio through a token-protected local bridge. Codex can inspect available models, submit image or video jobs, and query their status without receiving the user's API key.
defaultPrompt: Use iAgent to generate an image from my prompt.
Create a short video in iAgent and track its progress.
Show the image and video models available in iAgent.
